dimensions.name: risk_completeness
dimensions.description: Does each risk have trigger, impact, likelihood, owner, and mitigation?

anchors.1: Risks listed as vague bullets, no structure, no owner.
anchors.3: Most risks have owner + impact + likelihood; triggers and mitigations inconsistent.
anchors.5: Every risk has all five fields filled clearly; mitigations are specific and actionable.

dimensions.name: risk_differentiation
dimensions.description: Does the learner correctly distinguish Risk from Issue from Assumption from Dependency?

anchors.1: RAID items mislabeled; issues tagged as risks, dependencies as assumptions.
anchors.3: Most categories correct; occasional slippage between Risk/Issue or Assumption/Dependency.
anchors.5: Crisp differentiation; no miscategorization across the log.

dimensions.name: mitigation_realism
dimensions.description: Are mitigations specific, actionable, and proportional to impact?

anchors.5: All mitigations are specific, assigned to a role, proportional to the risk's impact and likelihood.

dimensions.name: ownership_and_accountability
dimensions.description: Is every RAID item owned by a named role with a follow-up date?

anchors.3: Most items have owners; some orphans; follow-up dates inconsistent.
anchors.5: Every item has named owner (or role) and explicit follow-up date.

dimensions.name: living_artifact_evidence
dimensions.description: Does the submission show the RAID log evolved week-over-week (updated status, closed items, new entries)?

anchors.1: Single snapshot, no evidence of updates.
anchors.3: Some evidence of weekly updates or status changes.
anchors.5: Clear week-over-week evolution with status changes, closed items, and new entries.
